calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-07-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Mercy Housing California.
Plaintiff's Witness John Ryan was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Artemio Garcia.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 172 6th St., #507, San Francisco, CA.
Lease agreement is forfeited.
No money judgment requested.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by John Ryan.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Artemio Garcia is not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of May-7-2012 remains on calendar.
